name: ui-dismantler
description: HTML 拆解为可复用组件库 - agent 驱动 + 确定性工具层

scripts.verify: python3 src/skill/scripts/validate_lib.py benchmark/lib && python3 scripts/roundtrip.py benchmark/original.html --lib benchmark/lib
scripts.analyze:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js analyze
scripts.validate:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js validate
scripts.roundtrip:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js roundtrip
scripts.quality:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js quality
scripts.visual:ts: npm run build:ts && node dist-ts/cli.js roundtrip
